name: Garlic-Chive Mashed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 cups Yukon Gold or baking potatoes, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cubed potatoes and garlic in a large saucepan and cover with water.
2. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 15 minutes.
3. Drain well.
4. Return the potato mixture and garlic to the saucepan.
5. Add milk, yogurt, and salt; beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until smooth.
6. Stir in chopped chives.
7. Garnish with whole chives if desired.
